supporting_quote: Cultured LNCaP cells ... were transfected using electroporation with 5,000 nM of modified oligonucleotide. After a treatment period of approximately 24 hours, RNA was isolated from the cells and Foxp3 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. Human primer probe set RTS35925 ... was used to measure mRNA levels. Foxp3 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent (FOXP3 ASO program, AZD8701). Verbatim quote read from USPTO image PDF of US20200179435A1 (Example 1, printed p.38), since Google Patents truncates before Examples. Quantitative real-time RT-PCR, primer probe set RTS35925, normalized to total RNA via RiboGreen. ACTB not used.

supporting_quote: Cultured A431 cells were treated with modified oligonucleotide at a concentration of 2,000 nM by free uptake at a density of 10,000 cells per well. After a treatment period of approximately 48 hours, total RNA was isolated from the cells, and PSD3 RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. PSD3 RNA levels were measured by either human primer-probe set RTS41429 ... or human primer-probe set RTS41435 ... as indicated in the tables below. PSD3 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Verbatim quote read from USPTO image PDF of US20230167446A1 (Example 1, printed p.42). Quantitative real-time RT-PCR, primer-probe sets RTS41429/RTS41435, normalized to total RNA via RiboGreen; results reported as % UTC. ACTB not used.

supporting_quote: Target transcript levels were quantified using FAM labeled TaqMan assays from Thermo Fisher Scientific in a multiplex reaction with a VIC labelled GUSB control. TaqMan primer assays for the target transcript of interest ATXN2 (Hs01002833_m1(FAM-MGB)), and a house keeping gene GUSB (4326320E VIC-MGB probe). ... ATXN2 mRNA levels are normalized to GUSB and shown as % of control (PBS treated cells).
notes: Read from family grant US11066669B2 (Google Patents full text); the US20200056179A1 Google Patents page truncates before Examples. RT-qPCR multiplex TaqMan, FAM target / VIC GUSB housekeeping normalizer. NOT an Ionis total-RNA/RiboGreen assay - this assignee uses GUSB housekeeping normalization.

supporting_quote: A431 cells ... were treated with ... modified oligonucleotide ... DNM2 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human primer probe set RTS36027 ... was used to measure mRNA levels. DNM2 mRNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Verbatim quote read from USPTO image PDF of grant US10865414B2 (Example 1, p.43), since Google Patents page truncates before Examples. Quantitative real-time RT-PCR, primer probe set RTS36027, normalized to total RNA via RiboGreen. Standard Ionis assay; ACTB not used.
